005/***************************************************************/
006package com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.driveAligned;
007
008import com.ctre.phoenix6.swerve.SwerveRequest;
009import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Gains.Swerve.Alignment;
010import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings.Driver.Drive;
011import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings.Swerve;
012import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.swerve.CommandSwerveDrivetrain;
013import com.stuypulse.stuylib.math.Vector2D;
014import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.vectors.VStream;
015import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.vectors.filters.VDeadZone;
016import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.vectors.filters.VLowPassFilter;
017import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.vectors.filters.VRateLimit;
018import dev.doglog.DogLog;
019import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose2d;
020import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Rotation2d;
021import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command;
022import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.CommandXboxController;
023import java.util.function.Supplier;
024
025public class SwerveDriveDriveWhileAligned extends Command {
026
027    protected static final CommandSwerveDrivetrain swerve;
028
029    private final CommandXboxController driver;
030
031    private final VStream speed;
032
033    private final Supplier<Pose2d> targetPose;
034
035    public SwerveDriveDriveWhileAligned(CommandXboxController driver, Supplier<Pose2d> targetPose) {
036        this.speed = VStream.create(this::getDriverInputAsVelocity)
037                .filtered(
038                        new VDeadZone(Drive.DEADBAND),
039                        x -> x.clamp(1),
040                        x -> x.pow(Drive.POWER),
041                        x -> x.mul(Swerve.Constraints.MAX_VELOCITY_M_PER_S),
042                        new VRateLimit(Swerve.Constraints.MAX_ACCEL_M_PER_S_SQUARED),
043                        new VLowPassFilter(Drive.RC));
044        this.driver = driver;
045        this.targetPose = targetPose;
046        addRequirements(swerve);
047    }
048
049    static {
050        swerve = CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance();
051    }
052
053    private Vector2D getDriverInputAsVelocity() {
054        return new Vector2D(-driver.getLeftY(), -driver.getLeftX());
055    }
056
057    public Rotation2d getTargetAngle() {
058        Pose2d currentPose = swerve.getPose();
059        double atan = Math.atan2(
060                targetPose.get().getY() - currentPose.getY(),
061                targetPose.get().getX() - currentPose.getX());
062        return new Rotation2d(atan);
063    }
064
065    @Override
066    public void execute() {
067        swerve.setControl(
068                new SwerveRequest.FieldCentricFacingAngle()
069                        .withVelocityX(speed.get().x)
070                        .withVelocityY(speed.get().y)
071                        .withTargetDirection(getTargetAngle())
072                        .withHeadingPID(Alignment.akP, Alignment.akI, Alignment.akD));
073        DogLog.log("Swerve/targetAngle", getTargetAngle().getDegrees());
074        DogLog.log("Swerve/Target Pose X", targetPose.get().getX());
075        DogLog.log("Swerve/Target Pose Y", targetPose.get().getY());
076    }
077}
